hero.tagline_html: Architecting the future of hearing intelligence through AI, cybersecurity & AI Agents.

paragraphs: I am the Founder & Director of H.E.A.Research Pvt Ltd, a health-tech startup developing next-generation smart hearing aids. My work sits at the intersection of artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, and AI Agents.

Backed by IIT Madras HTIC, Sathyabama University, and Sri Ramachandra Medical College incubation programs, I translate research into real-world products — from DSP audio pipelines to quantum-safe encryption systems.
I am a Computer Science Engineering student at Sathyabama Institute (2022–2026), building at the edges of what's possible with AI, hardware, and code.

bullets: Founded and independently developed a health-tech startup focused on smart hearing aid technologies.
Designed AI-powered hearing aids with intelligent noise cancellation and voice enhancement.
Building full ecosystem: mobile app integration, DSP audio processing, wearable hardware.
Executed startup strategy — manufacturing, clinical partnerships, commercialization.
Researched audio signal processing, AI-assisted hearing, embedded systems, quantum-safe tech.
Led data analysis and business intelligence interpretation.
Built Python-based analytics and automation workflows.
Gained experience in full-stack technologies and ML fundamentals.
Focused on AI, embedded systems, and startup technology.
Active in incubation programs and national innovation competitions.

projects.intro: From AI-powered hearing instruments to quantum-safe vaults — a collection of systems built at the boundary of research and engineering.

flagship.title: AI-Based Smart Hearing Aid System
flagship.description: Next-generation AI-powered hearing aid with intelligent noise cancellation, voice isolation, and adaptive hearing enhancement — controlled via a custom mobile application. The flagship project of H.E.A.Research Pvt Ltd.

list.category: AI Agents with Quantum based encryption
list.title: Quantum Prime X
list.description: Quantum Vault X Prime is an AI-powered autonomous digital security platform that combines Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC), multi-agent artificial intelligence, and real-time threat intelligence to protect sensitive digital assets before they become vulnerable.

list.title: Quantum Vault X
list.description: Futuristic encrypted file vault using quantum-safe encryption concepts for secure storage of documents, images, and sensitive files with stunning UI/UX.

list.title: AI Voice Assistant — Esha
list.description: Advanced personal AI assistant with voice authentication, smart automation, remote access, file handling, and multi-device control.

list.title: Vincent OS
list.description:
Built around a multi-agent AI architecture, Vincent OS coordinates specialized AI agents that collaborate to execute tasks such as coding, research, content creation, scheduling, cybersecurity monitoring, file management, and business operations. The system understands context across applications, allowing users to focus on outcomes rather than software.
Security is a core principle of Vincent OS. It incorporates post-quantum cryptography, privacy-first processing, and intelligent threat detection to protect user data while enabling secure AI automation. Every interaction is designed to be transparent, permission-based, and under the user's control.

list.title: Credit Card Fraud Detection
list.description: ML-based fraud detection identifying suspicious transaction patterns in real-time for banking security applications.

list.title: HearOS
list.description: HearOS is a premium, feature-rich executive dashboard custom-built for H.E.A.Research Pvt Ltd (founded by Nitin M). The platform serves as a specialized operational workspace and strategic intelligence layer to accelerate the development, validation, and fundraising process for next-generation, AI-powered hearing aid solutions.

contact.sub: Open to collaboration on hearing technology, AI-powered audio systems, and health-tech innovation.
